retry_reason: This is a release (put) operation; after calling it, the reference is released and the object may be freed. Retrying would risk a double-put and use-after-free.
contract_summary: Put-wrapper that removes the socket from the global atalk_sockets protected list and releases one reference (sk_refcnt). The caller must not access the socket after this call unless they hold an additional reference. The operation is protected by atalk_sockets_lock and is unconditional. No return value; the caller should assume the reference is consumed.
